ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Website: [Bat Cams](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://batworld.org/bat-cams/&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1748604678394216&usg=AOvVaw0EKUYMEFy9E8xwbwmItkw0) by BatWorld Organization
